sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30757" key="e)qelexqre/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐθελ-εχθρέω</orth>, <sense id="n30757.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bear a grudge against</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὁ ἐμφανισθεὶς ἂν ἐθελεχθρῇ τῷ μηνύσαντι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Charond.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.2.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
